# Wands
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Wands&prop=wikitext

The wand is the main weapon of the priest and the sorcerer. It is focused in average dps at really high range.
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = WandOfBone.png
| link = Wand of Bone
| text = Wand of Bone
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheApexBulwark.png
| link = The Apex Bulwark
| text = The Apex Bulwark
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StAbrahamsWand.png
| link = St. Abraham’s Wand
| text = St. Abraham’s Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = CrystalWand.png
| link = Crystal Wand
| text = Crystal Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ConductingWand.png
| link = Conducting Wand
| text = Conducting Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfTheBulwark.png
| link = Wand of the Bulwark
| text = Wand of the Bulwark
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RadiantWandOfRoyalism.png
| link = Radiant Wand of Royalism
| text = Radiant Wand of Royalism
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfTheFrozenQueen.png
| link = Wand of the Frozen Queen
| text = Wand of the Frozen Queen
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = RealmPower.png
| link = Realm Power
| text = Realm Power
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfTheFallen.png
| link = Wand of the Fallen
| text = Wand of the Fallen
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SpiceWandOfSpice.png
| link = Spice Wand of Spice
| text = Spice Wand of Spice
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = LethargicSentience.png
| link = Lethargic Sentience
| text = Lethargic Sentience
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = FrozenWand.png
| link = Frozen Wand
| text = Frozen Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = EternalSnowflakeWand.png
| link = Eternal Snowflake Wand
| text = Eternal Snowflake Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandFullOfMana.png
| link = Wand Full of Mana
| text = Wand Full of Mana
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfTheRisingStar.png
| link = Wand of the Rising Star
| text = Wand of the Rising Star
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AbominationsWrath.png
| link = Abomination’s Wrath
| text = Abomination’s Wrath
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = WandOfGeb.png
| link = Wand of Geb
| text = Wand of Geb
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheWingedWand.png
| link = The Winged Wand
| text = The Winged Wand
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Unique</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SpriteWand.png
| link = Sprite Wand
| text = Sprite Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = WandOfBuddingRomance.png
| link = Wand of Budding Romance
| text = Wand of Budding Romance
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = PresentDispensingWand.png
| link = Present Dispensing Wand
| text = Present Dispensing Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfAncientTerror.png
| link = Wand of Ancient Terror
| text = Wand of Ancient Terror
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfEggCellence.png
| link = Wand of Egg-Cellence
| text = Wand of Egg-Cellence
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CelestialCaduceus.png
| link = Celestial Caduceus
| text = Celestial Caduceus
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = WandOfAncientWarning.png
| link = Wand of Ancient Warning
| text = Wand of Ancient Warning
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfRecompense.png
| link = Wand of Recompense
| text = Wand of Recompense
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfEvocation.png
| link = Wand of Evocation
| text = Wand of Evocation
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = FireWand.png
| link = Fire Wand
| text = Fire Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ForceWand.png
| link = Force Wand
| text = Force Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = PowerWand.png
| link = Power Wand
| text = Power Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = MissileWand.png
| link = Missile Wand
| text = Missile Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = EldritchWand.png
| link = Eldritch Wand
| text = Eldritch Wand
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HellsFireWand.png
| link = Hell’s Fire Wand
| text = Hell’s Fire Wand
}}
|-
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfDarkMagic.png
| link = Wand of Dark Magic
| text = Wand of Dark Magic
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfArcaneFlame.png
| link = Wand of Arcane Flame
| text = Wand of Arcane Flame
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = WandOfDeath.png
| link = Wand of Death
| text = Wand of Death
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfDeepSorcery.png
| link = Wand of Deep Sorcery
| text = Wand of Deep Sorcery
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfShadow.png
| link = Wand of Shadow
| text = Wand of Shadow
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WandOfRetribution.png
| link = Wand of Retribution
| text = Wand of Retribution
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
